case_title: LAWRENCE M. SEIDLER VS. AGODA INTERNATIONAL USA INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEIDLER, LAWRENCE M. AS TO DEFENDANT AGODA INTERNATIONAL USA INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS - CSC LAWYERS INC) SERVED SEP-10-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AGODA INTERNATIONAL USA INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $175.00 FILED BY SEIDLER, LAWRENCE M. AS TO DEFENDANT AGODA INTERNATIONAL USA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
